text:
AOTs2Mä»–1 is the 14th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"AOTs2" is an abbreviation of Attack on Titan Season 2".

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:10) uses several samples similar to APETITAN, while the second part (2:10-4:08) is a remix of Barricades.
